assertions.assertion: Server-side code contains '.AddBffBlazorClient()' in the service configuration
assertions.rationale: Server-side code does not call AddBffBlazorClient(). It only calls AddBff() with manual auth setup.

assertions.assertion: Client-side code contains 'AddBffBlazorClient' with polling interval set to 30 seconds (TimeSpan.FromSeconds(30))
assertions.rationale: Client-side code does not call AddBffBlazorClient. It manually configures AuthenticationStateProvider.
Client-side code uses generic AddHttpClient<WeatherClient>, not AddLocalApiHttpClient<WeatherClient>.
Server-side code calls AddBff() but does not use ConfigureOpenIdConnect — it uses manual AddAuthentication.AddCookie.AddOpenIdConnect.
